判断型.description: understand, compare, review, audit, explain, or decide

修复型.description: fix a bug, regression, broken workflow, or broken test

改造型.description: add or change a focused capability inside an existing project

能力型.description: make the system truly able to do something deeper, less visible, or more rule-heavy

产品型.description: expand, build, or reshape a larger product or subsystem
